content:
Key Findings

  • Rossendale Borough Council spent £5.7M with CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD between 2021/22 and 2025/26.
  • This single supplier accounted for 8.4% of the council's total expenditure of £67.3M.
  • The top 5 suppliers combined received £19.7M, representing 29.2% of total spend.
  • CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD was the council's largest supplier by expenditure.
  • The top 10 suppliers collectively received £27.6M, or 41.0% of total spend.

CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD: Rossendale's Largest Supplier

Rossendale Borough Council spent £5.7M with CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD between 2021/22 and 2025/26. This expenditure represents 8.4% of the council's total spending of £67.3M across 42,536 transactions. As the council's largest supplier by expenditure, CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD plays a significant role in Rossendale's financial operations.

The scale of this relationship is notable when compared to other major suppliers. The next largest expenditure was £5.4M to COVID BUSINESS GRANT, followed by £4.1M to the DEPARTMENT FOR LEVELLING UP. This highlights the substantial portion of the council's budget directed towards CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD.

Comparing Rossendale's Top Suppliers

The top 5 suppliers to Rossendale Borough Council received a combined total of £19.7M, accounting for 29.2% of the council's total expenditure. This concentration of spending among a few suppliers is a common pattern in local government procurement, often due to the specialised nature of certain services.

When expanding the view to the top 10 suppliers, the total expenditure rises to £27.6M, or 41.0% of the total spend. This leaves £39.7M (59.0%) distributed among the remaining suppliers. The significant share of spending directed towards a small number of suppliers underscores the importance of scrutinising these relationships for value for money and service quality.

Rank Supplier Amount % of Total
1 CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD £5.7M 8.4%
2 COVID BUSINESS GRANT £5.4M 8.0%
3 DEPARTMENT FOR LEVELLING UP £4.1M 6.2%
4 BEIS £2.5M 3.7%
5 OZON SOLICITORS £2.0M 3.0%

What You Can Do

  • Submit a Freedom of Information request to Rossendale Borough Council about the specific services provided by CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD and the outcomes achieved.
  • Attend council committee meetings, which are open to the public, to learn more about procurement decisions and service contracts.
  • Check the council's published contracts register to review the terms and conditions of agreements with CAPITA BUSINESS SERVICES LTD and other major suppliers.
  • Write to your local councillor to express any concerns about the concentration of spending with a single supplier and ask for transparency on the value for money.
  • Visit aidoge.co.uk to explore the full spending data and analyse other aspects of Rossendale Borough Council's financial transactions.
This article is based on Rossendale Borough Council's published spending data covering 2021/22 to 2025/26. All figures are drawn directly from transactions published under the Local Government Transparency Code. Analysis by AI DOGE.
